summary: Full end-to-end test of WAEC Math AI MVP. 19/19 backend pytest cases passed (auth, topics, lessons, questions, attempts, progress, AI tutor via Gemini 3 Flash, history). 8/8 frontend flows passed (landing, register/login, dashboard, lesson with KaTeX, past questions with submission, AI tutor with KaTeX response, logout, protected route redirect). One minor UI polish issue: Dashboard 'Recent attempts' section renders raw $...$ markdown instead of using MathText component.

ui_bugs.issue: Question text displays raw LaTeX delimiters (e.g. 'Solve for $x$: $2x + 7 = 19$.') instead of rendered math. The MathText component should be used here just like on the Past Questions and Lessons pages.

issues: Success/error toasts (e.g. 'Welcome back!', 'Please select an option') render on top of the navigation bar, partially occluding the 'Dashboard' label. Consider lowering toast position or pushing nav z-index higher / repositioning toast below the header.

action_items: Render LaTeX in Dashboard 'Recent attempts' question_text via the existing MathText component (low priority polish).
Adjust toast position so it doesn't overlap the top navigation (low priority polish).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py question 'linear-equations 2021' (id seeded from QUESTIONS list) — the solution_steps explicitly note that the chosen answer 'y = 2' is not algebraically correct (true value is 2.8). Recommend replacing this question or fixing the equation so the correct answer is one of the options.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Recommend migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
Backend exposes EMERGENT_LLM_KEY error detail directly in the 500 response (`AI tutor unavailable: {str(e)}`) — okay for MVP but consider sanitizing for production.
test_credentials: student@waec.com / Student@123 (demo) — works; also registered fresh TEST_ users successfully.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 50 questions + demo user on startup. Tests registered transient TEST_<uuid>@example.com users; no cleanup performed (low volume, prefix is identifiable).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core MVP flows working end-to-end on https://mathmastery-waec.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_waec_backend.py is the regression suite. Only two cosmetic polish items remain (raw LaTeX in dashboard recent attempts, toast overlap with nav). AI tutor with gemini-3-flash-preview via emergentintegrations is live and returns ~6-15s step-by-step LaTeX responses.
rca of the issue: Dashboard recent_attempts shows raw LaTeX because Dashboard.jsx renders the question_text as plain text rather than passing it through MathText (which is used on Lessons.jsx, PastQuestions.jsx, and Tutor.jsx). Single-component swap fix.
